metaData.Key Information:
• Suitable for indoor drying
• 3x tough stains removal
• Provides 99.9% bacterial protection
• Protects coloured clothes from fading
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Use 1 cap for 1 full load
2. Adjust detergent amount according to the weight of laundry and to the intensity of stains
• Cautions:
1. Read washing instruction label before treatment on clothes
2. For best results, wash stained clothes immediately
3. Wash and dry hands after each wash
4. For sensitive skin, do not touch detergent for prolonged duration
5. If in contact with eyes, rinse with water for several minutes
6. If consumed, drink water and seek medical attention immediately

metaData.Key Information: Colour protect prevents colour from fading and keep colours bright. Be it rain or shine, clothes smells great even when dried indoors as it rids odor-causing bacteria during washing cycle. Outpower stains and odors as the advanced Japanese formula easily removes tough stains and perspiration odors. No more overnight soaking with it's powerful cleaning performance. The revolutionary advanced Japanese formula effectively eliminates 99.9% mite dust, stains and odors from your laundry, leaving it fresh and clean even when dried indoors. This product is also suitable for hand wash and top load machines.

offers.description: Buy 1 Breeze Liquid Detergent Refill - Colour Care @ $4.75

metaData.Key Information:
• 3X tough stains removal, *based on internal lab test vs ordinary detergent powder
• With colour guard technology to keep your coloured clothing bright and vivid after 30 washes
• Fresh fragrance
• Up to 119 washes
• Suitable for indoor drying
• Gentle on hands
metaData.Preparation:
• To wash:
1. Pour 1 cap to wash 15 - 20 clothes
2. Apply directly and rub detergent to pre-treat tougher stains
3. Pour the rest of detergent into washing machine
• Caution:
1. Read washing clothes immediately
2. For best results, wash stained clothes immediately
3. Wash and dry hands after each wash
4. For sensitive skin, do not touch detergent for prolonged durations
5. If in contact with eyes, rinse with water for several minutes
6. If consumed, drink water and seek medical attention immediately
